calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-07-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Specail Interrogatories And Imposing Monetary Sanction, Supporting Declaration Of Ronald J. Selgrath;
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT VEOLIA TRANSPORATION SERVICES, INC., and SUPERSHUTTLE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'s Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $452.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories And Imposing Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT VEOLIA TRANSPORATION SERVICES, INC. and SUPERSHUTTLE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'s Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed April 22, 2010. The first day this motion could have been heard is May 20, 2010. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-02-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-14-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 602
